summary: Backend-only regression for Phase O.3 SeniorTM parity fixes (itero.py L85/L162/L325 scoping, dashboards.py L186 team roster, doctors.py L139 team_id stamp). Wrote 10 pytest cases covering iTero pipeline/demos/demo-breakdown scope, TM/Manager regression, SeniorTM doctor create, and manager dashboard team roster. All 10 tests passed against the preview URL.

minor.issue: The SeniorTM demo user snr.demo.1782126329@field.io has team_id=None. The doctors.py L139 fix DOES stamp team_id=user.team_id, but because it is None, the stamp is a no-op in this environment. The code path is correct; only the seed data prevents verifying a non-null team_id propagation. Recommend seeding SeniorTM with an actual team_id so parity with Manager is observable end-to-end.

action_items: OPTIONAL: Update seed to give the demo SeniorTM user a valid team_id so team_id stamping on POST /doctors can be positively asserted (currently both senior.team_id and stamped value are None, so equality holds trivially).
No other SeniorTM-vs-TM asymmetries detected in the tested surface area (itero pipeline/board/demos/demo-breakdown, doctor create, manager dashboards).
critical_code_review_comments: itero.py L79-96 / L162-175 / L325-345 — SeniorTM branch correctly mirrors TM own-scope plus direct-report TM ids (via manager_user_id). Query filter `role: 'TM'` on the sub-lookup means a SeniorTM cannot manage another SeniorTM; if that scenario is intended, broaden to `role: {$in: ['TM','SeniorTM']}` (currently only TM subordinates are pulled).
dashboards.py L186 / L296 / L525 / L672 — role $in [TM, SeniorTM] applied consistently. Good.

doctors.py L133-141 — SeniorTM in TM branch (assigned_tm_id + team_id both stamped). Manager/SeniorTM elif branch is unreachable for SeniorTM because SeniorTM was already handled above (dead code for SeniorTM); harmless but slightly confusing. Consider dropping SeniorTM from the second elif for clarity.
test_credentials: SeniorTM snr.demo.1782126329@field.io/senior123, TM tm1@field.io/tm123, Manager manager@field.io/manager123, Admin admin@field.io/admin123 — all verified working
seed_data_creation: Test creates+deletes a single TEST_SnrDoc_<uuid> doctor per run (auto-cleanup in finally block).
context_for_next_testing_agent: SeniorTM scoping fixes validated. Senior sees 9 doctors on pipeline (matches TM1's 9), admin sees 326 — proving scope works. TM1 is confirmed as direct-report of Senior via visibility. If further regression needed, run: pytest /app/backend/tests/test_seniortm_access_parity.py -v.
